name: Daiquiri Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the crust ingredients and press into the bottom of a prepared springform pan. Bake at 350°F for 10 minutes.
2. Soften the gelatin in a small saucepan with 3/4 cup water, stirring until dissolved.
3. In a large bowl, beat egg yolks and sugar until thickened.
4. Gradually add the softened gelatin mixture to the yolk mixture, along with lime juice, rum, and both types of peel. Stir over medium heat until well combined and bubbling.
5. Remove from heat and let cool slightly.
6. In a large bowl, beat the cream cheese until smooth and fluffy. Slowly incorporate the cooled gelatin mixture while beating continuously.
7. Beat egg whites in another bowl until soft peaks form. Gradually add powdered sugar, continuing to beat until stiff peaks form.
8. Gently fold the whipped egg white mixture into the cream cheese batter.
9. Whip the remaining cream until light and fluffy, then gently fold it into the cheesecake batter.
10. Pour the batter into the prepared crust and refrigerate for several hours or overnight before serving.
